verdict.rationale: The authoritative Q2 2026 People Review reports structured learning hours of 1,757 for Q2 2026; the claimed 1,673 is the Prior (Q1 2026) figure shown in column C, not the current-quarter actual. The claim misattributes the prior-period value to Q2 2026.
verdict.suggested_action: Confirm the source document meant the current Q2 2026 actual (1,757) rather than the prior-period comparison (1,673), and correct the master claim.

final_text:
Based on my search, the authoritative Q2 2026 People Review document shows the actual Q2 2026 structured learning hours were 1,757 — not 1,673. The value 1,673 appears in that same document as the "Prior" column (i.e., Q1 2026's actual carried forward as the comparison baseline). The claim has used the prior-period figure rather than the current quarter's actual.
